old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.9","title":"Authorize downward source-route tunnels","description":"Define how an egress authenticates that a source-route tunnel was authorized by the active DODAG root. Bind root identity, outer route, inner source/destination, selected prefix, and replay state so any authenticated mesh node cannot use an egress as unauthorized transit.","acceptance_criteria":"Egress verifies authorized root tunnel provenance and delegated prefix before decapsulation; forged root, inner-source spoof, replay, route substitution, and unauthorized transit tests fail closed.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:53.948929Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:53.948929Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.9","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:54.092138Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.9","title":"Authorize downward source-route tunnels","description":"Define how an egress authenticates that a source-route tunnel was authorized by the active DODAG root. Bind root identity, outer route, inner source/destination, selected prefix, and replay state so any authenticated mesh node cannot use an egress as unauthorized transit.","acceptance_criteria":"Egress verifies authorized root tunnel provenance and delegated prefix before decapsulation; forged root, inner-source spoof, replay, route substitution, and unauthorized transit tests fail closed.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:53.948929Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-20T00:48:32.479649Z","started_at":"2026-07-20T00:48:32.479649Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-20T00:53:32.479649Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-20T00:48:32.479649Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.9","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:54.092138Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Blocked on protocol design. Existing spec 05-routing 8.9 and draft 7.4 define IPv6-in-IPv6/SRH and delegated-prefix checks, but no tunnel authentication wire field, signature transcript/domain, replay sequence representation/persistence, or active-root key provisioning/rotation at egress. Rust has only bare SourceRoutingHeader codec and no tunnel encapsulation/decapsulation implementation. Need approval of an authenticated root tunnel envelope before implementation; inventing one would create incompatible wire behavior."}
